JointDrillAffix.10001.2: The boss gains an Echo Codex that dissipates after taking a certain number of hits. When the boss casts certain skills, the Echo Codex casts similar skills.
JointDrillAffix.10002.2: The boss gains a Record Codex that dissipates after taking a certain number of hits but revives after some time. When the boss casts certain skills, the Record Codex records similar skills and casts them later.
JointDrillAffix.10003.2: The boss initially has high DMG Resistance. Each Echo Codex or Record Codex removed lowers the boss's DMG Resistance.
JointDrillAffix.10004.2: Each time a friendly unit deals DMG to the boss, increases the boss's DMG Taken for a short period.
JointDrillAffix.10005.2: The boss summons multiple Echo Codices to continuously channel energy. The fewer Echo Codices remaining when the channeling ends, the weaker the attacks from the boss.
JointDrillAffix.10006.2: The boss summons the Record Codices on the battlefield and absorbs them. The more Record Codices absorbed, the stronger the boss's attacks will become.
JointDrillAffix.10007.2: The boss gains an Echo Codex that takes much less Auto Attack DMG. When the boss casts certain skills, the Echo Codex casts similar skills.
JointDrillAffix.10008.2: The boss gains a Record Codex that takes much less Auto Attack DMG and revives after some time. When the boss casts certain skills, the Record Codex records similar skills and casts them later.
JointDrillAffix.10009.2: After a friendly unit deals damage to the boss a certain number of times, it increases the damage the boss takes for a short period.
JointDrillAffix.10010.2: When a friendly unit is on red or green tiles, this unit's DMG to same-color bosses is greatly reduced.
JointDrillAffix.10011.2: When a friendly unit is on red or green tiles, this unit's DMG to opposite-color bosses is significantly increased.
JointDrillAffix.10012.2: Certain boss skills can change the color of specific tiles on the board.
JointDrillAffix.10013.2: Upon the defeat of either boss, the battle permanently enters the second phase. Players will face the remaining boss alone on a newly manifested chessboard.
JointDrillAffix.10014.2: In the second phase, prioritize neutralizing the Flaming Lanterns. Their explosions will color massive tiles across the board.
